name: Voted best dick in the university
description:
While you have had a few different girlfriends over the school years somehow it leads to you being known for having the best dick in the school. In the year book people are voted on for things like "most likely to succeed" or "funniest person" but you were voted "best dick" much to your surprise.


You did hook up with a few girls this year. Apparently word got around that you are amazing in bed.



--------------------

No bonus pic or anything for this one. I basically wrote the whole thing on my phone while half asleep.
creator: Restart808
